programme.desc: It's a day of food, play & learning! The kids have a teddy bear picnic & learn to say hello with a wave!

programme.title: A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: It's a playtime sing-along! Mia & Max play a fishing game, have a tea party & pretend to be puppies!

programme.title: Fun Nature Discoveries!
programme.desc: Blippi makes fun nature discoveries! He learns why islands don't float & how ants walk in a straight line!

programme.title: Wonders Of The World & Beyond!
programme.desc: Blippi explores wonders of the world! He climbs Mt. Everest, dives underwater & blasts off to the moon!

programme.title: Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning & growing! He overcomes his fear of the carwash & learns the importance of dental health!

programme.desc: Buster is a hero for his friends! He saves Scout from a scary storm & gets pulled out of the mud by a tractor!

programme.title: Siblings Month: Creative Play Fun!
programme.desc: It's creative play fun! JJ does science experiments, makes a PB&J sandwich & plays "The Floor is Lava"!

programme.desc: Join JJ's fun learning club! He counts apples, learns shapes at lunch & goes on a color scavenger hunt!

programme.title: A Super Fun Day with Cody!
programme.desc: It's a super fun day with Cody! He has a special Hair Wash Day with Mom & goes on a dino safari with Dad!

programme.title: Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is stopping Weasel's wacky schemes! He catches Weasel cheating in a football match & stealing a battery!

programme.desc: It's a day of game day goofs & Grandma's fixes! A basketball game goes wrong & Grandma helps fix a bus!

programme.desc: Orphle & Winston have the worst ideas ever! They multiply Orphle & turn Winston into a rat by mistake!

programme.desc: Magical Pet powers run wild! A Bubble Monster traps everyone & a sick Shrubcub makes vines grow!

programme.desc: As almond orchard plantings have increased in Australia, so has the need for bees which are vital for pollination. Co-ordinating the annual mass migration of millions of bees to trees, is a bee broker, and it's a tough job.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Lonely Ah Zhen is bullied by his coworkers. When he spends his birthday with Yumi, his friends shockingly discover that Yumi is an inflatable doll. Seeking companionship, Ah Zhen turns to the internet and finds his ideal girl Mina. Her arrival transforms his life but a series of unexpected events unfold as her identity as a vampire is revealed.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory in an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help other coworkers leave safely and fight to kill the monster!

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears…

programme.title: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: Jas's peaceful countryside getaway with her sister Laura is shattered when a group of drifters attacks them. After Laura is brutally killed, Jas discovers her lifeless body at their rented cabin. Consumed by grief and fury, she vows to hunt down the gang and take vengeance on her sister's murderer.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Jing Wen, a struggling drama student, takes on a modelling job to help cover her tuition costs. As she becomes a model for an enigmatic artist specializing in expressive human body sketches, Jing Wen accidentally uncovers a shocking truth, plunging her into a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: Waning Moon
programme.desc: Nuanchan is a famous and highly respected spiritual medium in a rural village in Thailand. She wants to train her niece, Ploy, to succeed her and Ploy needs to remain a virgin. When Ploy falls in love with her childhood friend Tul, their lives are in danger as the secret of the spiritual world is being unveiled.

programme.title: The Windmill Massacre
programme.desc: Jennifer joins a tour to explore the renowned windmills of the Netherlands. As their tour coach breaks down on the way, they seek refuge in a creepy shed near a sinister windmill with a dark history. When some tour members suddenly disappear, Jennifer discovers a shared secret among them, linking their fates in a chilling revelation.

programme.title: Sinister
programme.desc: Si Nan and her husband travel to Kuala Lumpur for a vacation to relieve her pregnancy stress. However, she soon uncovers his evil plan to turn their child into a 'Luk Krok' for profit, which puts her in grave danger. With the help of the hotel ghosts, she manages to flee and alert the police to arrest him, finally giving birth to her child.

programme.title: Detective Dee: The Ghosts in Weird Town
programme.desc: Detective Dee investigates a series of terrifying vampire transformations in Youming Town, uncovering a sinister conspiracy masterminded by Prince Li Zhen, who plots to overthrow the empire. Armed with courage and ingenuity, Dee defeats the bloodthirsty vampires and ultimately exposes the prince’s dark ambitions.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: When reliable 22-year-old, Molly Jane Matheson, didn't show up for work, her mother Tracy drove to her Fort Worth, Texas apartment to check on her.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programme.desc: In 1987 Carol Murphy, 28, is found by hikers slain in a wooded area of Lefthand Canyon, CO. Police uncover a turbulent love life and plenty of suspects in this Western enclave.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez terrorised Southern California in the mid-1980s, and anyone could be a target. Growing up yearning for a father figure, he found mentorship with his sadistic cousin.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder (S1)
programme.desc: Ashlea and Emmett find they share the Mormon faith and within months are engaged. But seven years into their marriage, three cops come knocking on the couple's door.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: November 23, 2014, Springfield, Oregon. A housekeeper at the Village Inn Motel calls police when she finds a guest unresponsive and cold to the touch.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: When two teenage classmates in Northern California go missing within weeks of each other, their mothers struggle to get police to take the situation seriously.

programme.title: Taking The Stand (S2)
programme.desc: Romance novelist Nancy Brophy faces life in prison for the murder of her husband, Chef Dan Brophy. After finding surveillance video showing Nancy's minivan driving around the time and area of his murder.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Mom is assigned a travel article at work, she takes the entire family on a cross country road trip. But the trip gets off to a bumpy start when Lincoln tries to change Mom's itinerary to go to Dr. Weirdly's Bizarritorium.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Tired of her siblings walking all over her, Lucy turns to a spell book once owned by Great Grandma Harriet to teach her siblings a lesson.

programme.desc: Chloe, Jinx, and Booch are designing a new school mascot, but Max and Phoebe's fighting ruins the project. After Chloe expresses her anger toward her siblings, they realize their twin-fighting impacts Chloe in new ways now that they're guardians.

programme.desc: Lynn tries to stall her friends from riding the new coaster at Dairyland before they find out her big secret.

programme.desc: After accidentally activating an atomic bomb in the Man Cave, Ray and Henry decide to drive it out into the Swellview desert in order to save their city.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Spencer tries to surprise Carly for her birthday and ends up burning down her bedroom instead. But when the insurance company hands him a big check, he has a chance to make it up to her.

programme.title: iCarly
